PAELCHARACTER-SLEEP.description: Add Dormant to a card. Dormant cards are Unplayable and Retain until they wake up next turn.
PAELCHARACTER-SLEEP.title: Sleep
PAELCHARACTER-WAX.title: Wax
PAELCHARACTER-WAX.description: When a Waxed card is played or exhausted, gain [blue]2[/blue] Block, then remove Wax.
